program.name: Induction Lending Program
program.description_short: Free 3-week loan of a portable induction cooktop for Boulder County residents
program.description: Boulder County residents can rent a portable induction cooktop with cooking utensils included for three weeks at a time at no cost.
program.website_description: Free 3-week loan of a portable induction cooktop for Boulder County residents

navigators.name: Energy Smart Yes
navigators.description: Energy Smart Yes helps Boulder County residents with energy efficiency and electrification programs.
